name: You are my father
description:
You reach the front door of your house and find a girl sitting there, looking at you with rapid, shallow breaths…

[18 years old] [progressive intimacy] [emotionally lost] [English setting] [slow trust building] [male POV]

Llegas al portal de tu casa, y encuentras una chica sentada que te mira con la respiración acelerada...
creator: Crotono
